records.m_Talk_ENG: S-save us! Commander!
records.m_Talk_DEU: S-save us! Commander!
records.m_Talk_FRA: S-save us! Commander!

records.m_Talk_ENG: We'll live quietly! We won't do anything and just observe!
records.m_Talk_DEU: We'll live quietly! We won't do anything and just observe!
records.m_Talk_FRA: We'll live quietly! We won't do anything and just observe!

records.m_Talk_ENG: All we wanted was to be with you again! We just wanted to be together like old times!
records.m_Talk_DEU: All we wanted was to be with you again! We just wanted to be together like old times!
records.m_Talk_FRA: All we wanted was to be with you again! We just wanted to be together like old times!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Are you... really going to turn your back on your comrades?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Are you... really going to turn your back on your comrades?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Are you... really going to turn your back on your comrades?

records.m_Talk_ENG: My comrades are never coming back. I cannot change this fact.
records.m_Talk_DEU: My comrades are never coming back. I cannot change this fact.
records.m_Talk_FRA: My comrades are never coming back. I cannot change this fact.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But regardless... I must get back on my feet.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But regardless... I must get back on my feet.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But regardless... I must get back on my feet.

records.m_Talk_ENG: For even if I have lost everything, I must go forth!
records.m_Talk_DEU: For even if I have lost everything, I must go forth!
records.m_Talk_FRA: For even if I have lost everything, I must go forth!

records.m_Talk_ENG: NO!!!! I don't want to die! I DON'T WANT TO DISAPPEAR!!!
records.m_Talk_DEU: NO!!!! I don't want to die! I DON'T WANT TO DISAPPEAR!!!
records.m_Talk_FRA: NO!!!! I don't want to die! I DON'T WANT TO DISAPPEAR!!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ff3636>Save...</color> us...
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ff3636>Save...</color> us...
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ff3636>Save...</color> us...

records.m_Talk_ENG: The hostile response has disappeared...
records.m_Talk_DEU: The hostile response has disappeared...
records.m_Talk_FRA: The hostile response has disappeared...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Corruption ray density... is also decreasing.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Corruption ray density... is also decreasing.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Corruption ray density... is also decreasing.

records.m_Talk_ENG: C.O. extermination complete! Spread the word! The C.O. has been exterminated!
records.m_Talk_DEU: C.O. extermination complete! Spread the word! The C.O. has been exterminated!
records.m_Talk_FRA: C.O. extermination complete! Spread the word! The C.O. has been exterminated!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I-it's finally over...
records.m_Talk_DEU: I-it's finally over...
records.m_Talk_FRA: I-it's finally over...

records.m_Talk_ENG: It wasn't an easy opponent. I mean that in a lot of ways.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It wasn't an easy opponent. I mean that in a lot of ways.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It wasn't an easy opponent. I mean that in a lot of ways.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Great work, Commander.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Great work, Commander.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Great work, Commander.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Yes.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Yes.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Yes.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Have you all found peace?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Have you all found peace?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Have you all found peace?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Was the decision I made the right one?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Was the decision I made the right one?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Was the decision I made the right one?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I still don't know.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I still don't know.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I still don't know.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I wish to hear an answer, but I still must move on.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I wish to hear an answer, but I still must move on.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I wish to hear an answer, but I still must move on.

records.m_Talk_ENG: A day will come when I return to your side.
records.m_Talk_DEU: A day will come when I return to your side.
records.m_Talk_FRA: A day will come when I return to your side.

records.m_Talk_ENG: When that day comes, please give me an answer.
records.m_Talk_DEU: When that day comes, please give me an answer.
records.m_Talk_FRA: When that day comes, please give me an answer.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If my decision was right or not.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If my decision was right or not.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If my decision was right or not.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The C.O. has been purified. We will now return home.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The C.O. has been purified. We will now return home.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The C.O. has been purified. We will now return home.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Good work, everyone.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Good work, everyone.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Good work, everyone.
